# Revival Tattoo Collective

> Custom award-winning tattoo studio in Largo, Florida. Specializing in color realism, surrealism, lettering, and sign painting.

## About

Revival Tattoo Collective is an award-winning custom tattoo studio located at 519 Highland Ave N, Suite A, Largo, FL 33770. The studio is home to a collective of artists known for bold, lasting work across multiple styles. Walk-ins welcome — appointments recommended.

- Phone: (727) 600-8001
- Email: revivaltattoocollective@gmail.com
- Website: https://revivaltattoocollective.com
- Hours: Tuesday–Saturday, 11 AM – 8 PM

## Artists

- [FattMatt](/artists/matt): Award-winning color realism and surrealism. Bold, saturated, dream-state portraits and surreal compositions.
- [Brady Martinson](/artists/brady): Founder of Revival. Lettering, sign painting, blackletter, and custom typography on skin.

## Services

- Custom tattoos (color realism, surrealism, traditional, lettering, sign painting)
- Walk-in tattoos
- Consultations
- Merch: signed prints and limited drops

## Pages

- [Home](/): Studio overview, artists, about, and booking.
- [Artists — FattMatt](/artists/matt): Full portfolio and booking for Matt.
- [Artists — Brady Martinson](/artists/brady): Full portfolio and booking for Brady.
- [Merch](/merch): Signed prints and limited drops shipped from the studio.
